ogTitle: Gillieston vs Gipsy Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gillieston and Gipsy Point.
heading: Gillieston vs Gipsy Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gillieston, Victoria and Gipsy Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gipsy Point has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Gillieston (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gillieston or Gipsy Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gillieston has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Gipsy Point scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gillieston scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Gipsy Point scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gillieston or Gipsy Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gipsy Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
